calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-04-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing Re: Request For Entry Of Default Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-17-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, Proceedings reported by: Irene L. Tofft, CSR#12913.

Jonathan Bornstein, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, MCCORMACK ABRON RAGAN MANAGEMENT SERVICE, INC.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) MAURICE POWELL.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1- 10 dismissed without prejudice.
David Mauroff sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Judgment for Permanent injuction against defendant Maurice Powell Jr., is granted. Maurice Powell Jr. is hereby enjoined and restrained from entering into, onto, or being within 150 yards of the Bernal Dwellings housing developent properties. The description and location of the addresses that comprise Bernal Dwellings propertis are described in and attached hereto as Exhibt A and herby incorporated by this refrence as though fully stated herein.
Judgment signed in open court.
